title: Assign Sub-Item Due Date Week Before based on Parent Task Date
excerpt: In my Monday.com board, I have a parent task that we’ll say is: “Create marketing copy” and it’s set to August 7th. Is it possible to create a sub-item task for someone else that is created once the Parent August 7th due…

posts.author: Buckyx55 (Ronald Burns)
posts.cookedHtml: In my Monday.com board, I have a parent task that we’ll say is: “Create marketing copy” and it’s set to August 7th. Is it possible to create a sub-item task for someone else that is created once the Parent August 7th due date is input, and then the sub-item date is set a week before like August 1st?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, you can with a workflow. You’ll essentially tell it ‘When date changes on parent item’, create a subitem (pulling the date from parent item into a date column in the subitem). Then another step to ‘push date’ of the subitem (you can set it to do 7 days before).
